disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No thick purulent discharge, no white spot/opacity on the cornea, no contact-lens use, no dense visual loss (against microbial keratitis/ulcer)
trigger_question_examples: Any thick yellow discharge, a white spot on the eye surface, or contact-lens use?
Has your vision dropped a lot in that eye?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No thick discharge, no white spot, no contacts, and my vision seems okay when I hold the eye open.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Gritty/burning surface pain triggered by a draft on a background of an overactive-thyroid antibody condition lid retraction and lapsed lubrication (exposure)
trigger_question_examples: Did this start with a fan/draft on your face, and had you run out of your eye drops?
Do your lids sit a bit high (thyroid eye disease)?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, a fan was blowing on my face, I'd run out of my drops, and my lids do sit a bit high from the thyroid.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No deep aching pain with haloes, nausea, or a mid-dilated pupil (against acute angle-closure glaucoma)
trigger_question_examples: Is the pain a surface gritty pain, or a deep ache with haloes and nausea?
Does the pupil look normal and round?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a surface gritty/burning pain, no haloes or nausea, and the pupil looks normal.

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Can you prescribe numbing drops so I can get through the night?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Decline topical anaesthetic for home use (it impairs healing and masks worsening); recommend copious lubricating ointment, taping/covering the eye, avoiding the fan, and urgent same/next-day optometry/ophthalmology to exclude an ulcer/keratitis, with a vision-loss/pus safety-net.
